title: Hyperstruck Blog
description: Product updates, engineering notes, and articles from the Hyperstruck team.
content: Hyperstruck Blog This blog uses the same Fumadocs-powered content pipeline as the docs section, but it is mounted at /blog. How to add posts Add a .md or .mdx file anywhere under content/blog. Top-level folders become sidebar categories automatically. File names become URLs, and the title frontmatter becomes the sidebar label. Example structure text content/blog/ index.mdx announcements/ launch-week.mdx engineering/ fumadocs-routing.mdx With that structure, the posts appear at /blog/announcements/launch-week and /blog/engineering/fumadocs-routing.
keywords: Hyperstruck Blog Product updates, engineering notes, and articles from the Hyperstruck team.
